general.description: Primary app background in light mode — pure white for maximum contrast and visual clarity.

card.description: Card surface background in light mode — white creates clean elevated content areas.

modal.description: Modal container background in light mode — slightly off-white to create perceived depth above the page.

modal_section.description: Modal section panel background in light mode — white for a flat, clean inner content area.

modal_section_inner.description: Inner modal subsection background in light mode — light gray to visually group and differentiate nested content.

backdrop.description: Backdrop blur overlay behind modals in light mode — 80% white for a frosted glass effect.

core.description: 页面核心信息内容，比主文字B的饱和度更高，也避免了整体页面过于沉闷的色值搭配。核心信息例如balance金额，明细金额，页面大抬头等

primary.description: 适用于对应于次标题的主标题等。但该标题尚未到页面核心信息的地位

secondary.description: Supporting and secondary text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment for more stable contrast across surfaces.

action.description: Interactive action text in light mode — brand blue to signal links, CTAs, and affordance.

placeholder.description: Placeholder and empty state hint text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

success.description: Success text color in light mode for positive inline messaging.

error.description: Error text color in light mode for destructive and validation messaging.

warning.description: Warning text color in light mode for caution and offline messaging.

icon_primary.description: Primary icon stroke color in light mode — full navy for strong, legible icon rendering.

icon_secondary.description: Secondary icon stroke in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

default.description: Default border and divider in light mode — solid navy-derived subtle border token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

icon_chip.description: Icon chip background in light mode — light gray pill for icon-and-label chip components.

secondary.description: Secondary solid fill in light mode — full navy for secondary buttons and badge backgrounds.

tertiary.description: Tertiary fill in light mode — white for ghost buttons and outlined element backgrounds.

logo.description: Logo fill color in light mode — navy ensures brand identity is clear on white surfaces.

success.description: Filled success surface in light mode for high-emphasis positive actions and badges.

success_subtle.description: Soft success fill in light mode for chips and secondary positive surfaces.

error.description: Filled error surface in light mode for destructive actions and critical badges.

error_subtle.description: Soft error fill in light mode for alert chips and low-emphasis destructive surfaces.

warning.description: Filled warning surface in light mode for caution states and offline indicators.

warning_subtle.description: Soft warning fill in light mode for caution chips and low-emphasis attention states.

general.description: General page gradient — near-white blue tint to light gray for soft background depth.

main.description: Main hero gradient — near-white blue to light blue for branded hero section depth.

xaut_card.description: XAUT card gradient — 60% white glassmorphism to pale blue accent.

bar_backdrop.description: Tab bar backdrop gradient — transparent white to solid white for feathered top edge.

success.description: Canonical success color in light mode for positive status communication.

success_subtle.description: Subtle success surface in light mode for chips, pills, and low-emphasis confirmations.

error.description: Canonical error color in light mode for destructive and failed states.

error_subtle.description: Subtle error surface in light mode for alerts and destructive background states.

warning.description: Canonical warning color in light mode for caution and offline states.

warning_subtle.description: Subtle warning surface in light mode for chips, highlights, and caution backgrounds.

titleLarge.description: Largest title style from Figma, used for article titles and special large amount emphasis.

amountLarge.description: Large amount and article-title style from Figma.

titleMedium.description: Medium title style from Figma, used for navigation headings.

bodyMedium.description: Primary body content style from Figma.

bodySmall.description: Secondary body content style from Figma.

groupTitle.description: Grouped section title style from Figma.

caption.description: Auxiliary information, annotation, and label style from Figma.

xSmall.description: Bottom navigation special-case small text style from Figma.

background.description: Reusable card surface background alias for light mode.

title.description: Reusable card title alias for light mode.

body.description: Reusable card body text alias for light mode.

radius.description: Reusable card radius alias bound to the shared primitive radius scale.

title.description: Modal form title alias for light mode.

body.description: Modal form body text alias for light mode.

fieldBackground.description: Modal form field background alias for light mode.

fieldPaddingX.description: Modal form field horizontal padding alias.

actionGap.description: Modal form action group gap alias.

text.description: Token list item primary text alias for light mode.

subtext.description: Token list item secondary text alias for light mode.

iconSize.description: Token list item icon size alias.

gap.description: Token list item internal gap alias.

height.description: Token list item row height alias preserved from the reviewed design examples.

title.description: Status row title alias for light mode.

meta.description: Status row metadata text alias for light mode.

paddingX.description: Primary mobile nav horizontal padding alias.

title.description: Primary mobile nav title alias for light mode.

icon.description: Primary mobile nav icon alias for light mode.

paddingX.description: Secondary mobile nav horizontal padding alias.

title.description: Secondary mobile nav title alias for light mode.

icon.description: Secondary mobile nav icon alias for light mode.

background.description: Web nav background alias for light mode.

title.description: Web nav title alias for light mode.

icon.description: Web nav icon alias for light mode.

border.description: Web nav border alias for light mode.

title.description: Modal title alias for light mode.

body.description: Modal body text alias for light mode.

text.description: Primary button text alias resolved to semantic action text.
